content:
🚀 koharu | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automated, local-first manga translation with ML-powered features and editable export options.
✨ Key Features: • Automatic detection of text regions, speech bubbles, and cleanup masks • OCR for manga dialogue, captions, and other page text • Inpainting to remove source lettering from the page • Translation with local or remote LLM backends
📖 Summary: Koharu is a Rust-based desktop application that automates the process of translating manga. It leverages machine learning models for text detection, OCR, inpainting to remove original text, and translation via LLMs, all running locally for privacy. The application supports advanced text rendering and offers features like layered PSD export for further editing.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
